facts.claim: Audited backend: Dev-Infra-Grupo-AMH/ahlabs-trilhas @ commit 8166c07eaef97ad4f9b2a0e51235f3fc3d0feb7f (master) — 608 files (519 .py), Django + DRF.
Audited frontend: Dev-Infra-Grupo-AMH/trilhas-frontend @ commit f9656be2660ec2048ce6240b4ac418b7fe7d5a5b (master) — 681 files, Next.js + TypeScript.
Audit dates: 2026-07-03 (evening) → 2026-07-04 (early morning). Method: static analysis only over read-only clones of the two pinned commits; no legacy code executed, no legacy repo written to.

Core deliverable: a 959-rule catalog with full provenance (repo:path:lines @ commit per rule), reimplementable pseudocode, edge cases as-implemented, and explicit divergence blocks where legacy implementations disagree. Index: README.md; machine source of truth: extraction/phase2/catalog/.
A 351-item escalation queue (ESCALATIONS.md), every DISCREPANCY/AMBIGUOUS/UNVERIFIABLE item ranked by clinical risk, including 12 P0 (high-impact) findings.

18 ADRs (../adr/README.md) plus a full design-system inventory (../design/design-system-inventory.md) were produced from the frontend design audit; all ADR outcomes are 'proposed', pending team ratification.

File coverage: 1,289 / 1,289 files examined and dispositioned (100%) — 608 backend + 681 frontend; every file received a verdict including explicit 'no rules found', independently re-checked by the Phase 6 coverage sweep.

Extraction status of the 959 catalog rules: 719 OK (75.0%) · 164 DISCREPANCY (17.1%) · 76 AMBIGUOUS (7.9%). This measures internal consistency/cross-implementation agreement, independent of reference verification.

Verification verdicts across the 959 rules: 73 VERIFIED · 104 DISCREPANCY · 102 UNVERIFIABLE · 680 not-applicable (non-formula, n-a). Of the 279 verification-eligible rules: VERIFIED 73 (26.2%), DISCREPANCY 104 (37.3%), UNVERIFIABLE 102 (36.6%).

Escalations: 351 items total, by band — P0 12 / P1 45 / P2 35 / P3 99 / UNVERIFIABLE-owner-review 101 / AMBIGUOUS 56 / Phase-6 addendum 3. Each item appears in exactly one band (its highest applicable).

Adversarial phase (Phase 6) results: 0 of 73 VERIFIED verdicts were refuted when attacked; 54 of 54 fidelity spot-checks re-derived from source were faithful (0 unfaithful); 12 residual gap rules were found by the coverage re-sweep and all remediated (this is the audit's measured miss rate for the extraction pass).

Methodology, line 1: a six-phase pipeline (Phase 0 Inventory & partition; Phase 1 parallel extraction, 22 partitions + coordination residue; Phase 2 cluster reconciliation into 27 domain clusters; Phase 3 reference-based verification, ≥3 hand-traced test vectors per formula rule; Phase 4 canonical Markdown documentation; Phase 5 design audit, 3 parallel inventories → 18 ADRs; Phase 6 adversarial phase, 3 independent attacks on the audit's own output).

Methodology, line 2: orchestration ~215 agent runs consuming ~23M subagent tokens; model routing was task-appropriate — opus for clinical extraction/reconciliation/verification/adversarial review, sonnet for mechanical API/UI extraction, integration, and document writing.

Extraction→reconciliation accounting: Phase 1 provisional extractions 1,018 → Phase 2 reconciled (dedup + re-home, 35 misrouted rules re-homed) 947 → Phase 6 gap rules added +12 → final catalog 959. Every provisional ID was consumed exactly once during reconciliation (verified mechanically); 1,030 raw extractions sit behind the 959 final rules.

Catalog taxonomy (10 cross-cutting categories, 959 rules total): data-validation 314, care-pathway 211, alert-threshold 116, scheduling-operational 66, clinical-scoring 65, triage-eligibility 57, physiological-calculation 47, billing-administrative 38, drug-dosing 29, access-control 16.

27 reconciled clusters (legacy-domain grouping, distinct from the 10-category taxonomy): alertas, antimicrobiano, auditoria-logs, auth-usuarios, balanco-hidrico, cadastros-ui, clinical-scoring, comunicacao, documentacao-faturamento, eficiencia, equilibrio, estabilidade, evolucoes, formularios-clinicos, indicadores-etl, movimentacao-adt, nutricao, operacional-infra, piora-clinica, prescricao, profilaxia, sedacao, sepse, sinais-vitais, tenancy-organizacao, trilhas-engine, ventilacao.

279 of the 959 rules were verification-eligible (had a checkable formula/threshold); the remaining 680 are non-formula and marked not-applicable (n-a). A verdict assesses against a published clinical reference, not against faithfulness to legacy intent.
Verdict share of the 959 catalog: VERIFIED 7.6%, DISCREPANCY 10.8%, UNVERIFIABLE 10.6%, not-applicable 70.9%.
P0 band (12 items) category composition: clinical-scoring 5, physiological-calculation 2, alert-threshold 2, drug-dosing 1, care-pathway 1, triage-eligibility 1.
P1 band (45 items) category composition: alert-threshold 16, clinical-scoring 8, physiological-calculation 8, care-pathway 9, triage-eligibility 3, drug-dosing 1.
P2 band (35 items) category composition: clinical-scoring 8, triage-eligibility 6, alert-threshold 6, physiological-calculation 5, care-pathway 5, drug-dosing 3, scheduling-operational 2.

P3 band (99 items) category composition: data-validation 43, care-pathway 21, alert-threshold 10, clinical-scoring 5, triage-eligibility 6, scheduling-operational 6, drug-dosing 3, billing-administrative 3, physiological-calculation 1, access-control 1.

RULE-CLINICAL-SCORING-002 (clinical-scoring, P0): SOFA respiratory sub-score reads FiO2 as a percentage, making P/F ~100x too small (over-scores to 4); the 3/4-point bands are applied without the ventilation gate.
RULE-CLINICAL-SCORING-005 (clinical-scoring, P0): SOFA cardiovascular sub-score reads noradrenaline as raw ml volume (cutoff 10) instead of mcg/kg/min rate; dopamine/epinephrine are omitted.

RULE-CLINICAL-SCORING-007 (clinical-scoring, P0): SOFA renal sub-score's strict '> 5' leaves a dead gap at (4.9, 5.0], so creatinine exactly 5.0 mg/dL scores 0 — a 4-point undercount at the top of the scale.
RULE-PIORA-CLINICA-006 (clinical-scoring, P0): chained comparison 'if 7 <= dor > 10' never fires — severe numeric pain (NRS 7-10) never triggers a red alert.
RULE-PIORA-CLINICA-007 (clinical-scoring, P0): same chained-comparison misparse for behavioral pain (BPS 10-12) — maximal pain in sedated patients never fires a red alert.

RULE-CLINICAL-SCORING-008 (physiological-calculation, P0): P/F ratio validator stores FiO2 as a percentage while all consumers assume a fraction — the codebase is internally inconsistent on FiO2 units.
RULE-SEPSE-014 (physiological-calculation, P0): homecare sepsis oliguria criterion — a 'fromkeys' diagnosis gate is always false, plus a weight parse ~10x inflated, so the criterion can never fire.
RULE-EFICIENCIA-005 (alert-threshold, P0): suspected-brain-death criterion uses GCS<13 instead of <6, has an AND-collapsed sedative-absence filter, and is also left unwired.
RULE-PIORA-CLINICA-010 (alert-threshold, P0): last-writer-wins alert aggregation downgrades a red (VERMELHO) alert to yellow; magnitude-only summation makes the top band unreachable.
RULE-VENTILACAO-011 (care-pathway, P0): extubation-readiness bundle reads FiO2 as a fraction (<0.4) while the data is percentage, so the readiness alert never fires (weaning delayed).
RULE-SEPSE-043 (triage-eligibility, P0): major hypotension criterion compares PAD < 90 mmHg while the rule text says < 60 mmHg — satisfied by nearly everyone, driving false sepsis alerts.
RULE-ESTABILIDADE-016 (drug-dosing, P0): vasopressor-escalation alert text states doses in mcg/kg/min while the paired predicates trigger on ml/h; a FC>130 bpm criterion the predicate never checks.

Sepsis aggregation divergence v1-vs-v3: RULE-SEPSE-001 requires major AND minor thresholds; RULE-SEPSE-002 uses OR (and moves one criterion from minor to major) for the same nominal sepsis screen — materially more patients flagged under v3.

Shared default signing PIN: RULE-AUTH-USUARIOS-063 — Usuario.pin defaults to a single deployment-wide settings.PIN_DEFAULT, base64-encoded and sent as the CryptoCubo e-signature credential; un-rotated PINs defeat per-user attribution of signed clinical documents. Companion frontend finding: RULE-CADASTROS-UI-006.

10 cross-cutting systemic root causes recur across clusters (full affected-rule lists in ESCALATIONS.md#cross-cutting-systemic-issues): (1) FiO2 percent-vs-fraction inconsistency ~100x error; (2) vasopressor dose-unit chaos (ml/ml-h vs mcg/kg/min vs mcg/kg/h, incl. 60x min-vs-hour label drift); (3) lactate mg/dL vs mmol/L ~9x factor; (4) facade-text vs model-predicate drift; (5) v1-vs-v3 AND/OR aggregation divergence; (6) chained-comparison misparse (e.g. 'if 7<=dor>10') suppressing worst-band pain/agitation; (7) off-by-one/exclusive-range band-edge gaps; (8) dead/unwired/unreachable criterion code; (9) weight decimal-separator parse ~10x inflation; (10) month-agnostic day-of-month date filtering contaminating 07:00-07:00 windows.
Known limitation: static analysis only — legacy code was never executed; all test vectors were hand-traced through the code. Behavior under real production data is inferred, not observed.
Known limitation: 102 UNVERIFIABLE rules are proprietary internal logic with no published reference; they require owner/clinical-committee confirmation of intent before reimplementation.

Known limitation: fidelity spot-check sampled 54 / 959 catalog entries (all passed); extraction breadth was independently checked by the Phase 6 coverage sweep rather than by a full second extraction pass.

Known limitation: no legacy regression suite exists for the automated/homecare engines. Legacy CI tests only trilha_manual; there is no regression coverage for the automated or homecare pathways (operacional-infra cluster / COORD-001 finding), so those engines' runtime behavior is the least externally corroborated.

Known limitation: Portuguese clinical vocabularies are preserved verbatim, including source typos (e.g. the 'criterio8' key-typo in the addendum), flagged wherever matching logic depends on the exact string.

Operational anomalies during the run (none caused data loss or unverified output): 42 verification batches hit a rate limit and resumed from cache; agents reporting failure at final-report step had complete, validated on-disk output; mid-Phase-4 catalog condensation was recovered from git; 421 rule docs were mechanically normalized (content untouched); one gap-remediation agent died with zero output and was re-run with per-gap persistence.

Definition-of-done: all 5 criteria met — (1) 1,289/1,289 files dispositioned; (2) 959 rules documented, each reimplementable from the catalog alone with full provenance; (3) 279 eligible verdicts (73V/104D/102U) each with >=3 hand-traced test vectors; (4) 351 items escalated and ranked, zero silent corrections; (5) independently re-checked — 12 gaps found & remediated, 0/73 VERIFIED refuted, 54/54 fidelity spot-checks faithful. Design-audit track (18 ADRs + design-system inventory) delivered alongside; all ADR outcomes 'proposed', pending team ratification.

Ratification ask 1: Clinical committee review of all P0 and P1 findings (57 items) — for each, rule whether the legacy behavior is intended (carry forward) or a defect (change). Start with the 12 P0 items in ESCALATIONS.md.

Ratification ask 2: Owner confirmation of the 101 UNVERIFIABLE owner-review rules (plus the 102 UNVERIFIABLE verification verdicts they derive from) — proprietary logic whose intent only the product/clinical owner can confirm.

Ratification ask 3: Legal review of the e-signature findings — the shared default signing PIN (RULE-AUTH-USUARIOS-063) and the default CryptoCubo signature profile (advanced, ICP-Brasil disabled; RULE-DOCUMENTACAO-FATURAMENTO-032) against MP 2.200-2 / ICP-Brasil e-signature norms.
Ratification ask 4: Decision on v1-vs-v3 sepsis aggregation — whether the new platform adopts v1 AND-logic or v3 OR-logic as the canonical sepsis screen (RULE-SEPSE-001 / RULE-SEPSE-002).

Ratification ask 5: Canonical unit decisions before any reimplementation — a single ratified convention for FiO2 (fraction vs percentage), lactate (mg/dL vs mmol/L), and vasopressor dosing (mcg/kg/min vs ml/h vs raw ml), resolving cross-cutting issues 1-3 once rather than rule-by-rule.

constraints.text: Core guarantee — zero silent corrections. Nothing in the catalog was fixed; every legacy behavior (inverted predicates, unit mismatches, off-by-one boundaries, dead branches, structurally-always-false guards) is preserved verbatim. Carrying forward vs. changing a behavior is a human clinical/business decision, escalated in ESCALATIONS.md, never resolved silently.

DISCREPANCY/AMBIGUOUS discipline MUST be preserved: DISCREPANCY = implementations disagree with each other or a published reference; AMBIGUOUS = intent could not be pinned down. Neither status may be silently resolved; every DISCREPANCY/AMBIGUOUS/UNVERIFIABLE rule (351 total) must be escalated and clinically ranked.

UNVERIFIABLE != wrong. A rule marked UNVERIFIABLE (102 verification verdicts / 101 owner-review escalations) is proprietary internal logic with no published reference; it MUST be flagged for owner/clinical-committee confirmation of intent and MUST NOT be presumed defective.

Human ratification MUST occur before reimplementation begins for: all P0+P1 findings (57 items), the 101 UNVERIFIABLE owner-review rules, the e-signature legal-review items, the v1-vs-v3 sepsis aggregation decision, and the canonical FiO2/lactate/vasopressor-dosing unit decisions. These are explicitly out of scope for the audit itself.
The new platform SHOULD implement from the audit's documents (rule catalog), not from the legacy code.
Portuguese clinical vocabulary and source typos (e.g. the 'criterio8' key-typo) MUST be preserved verbatim wherever matching logic depends on the exact string.
Every rule MUST be reimplementable from the catalog alone, without reading legacy code, carrying full provenance as repo:path:lines @ commit.

Every formula/threshold rule MUST be verified against an authoritative published reference with >=3 hand-traced test vectors, or explicitly marked UNVERIFIABLE / not-applicable — no formula rule may be left unverified without a stated reason.

open_questions: None of ASK-1..ASK-5 have been ratified as of this report; downstream designers must treat P0/P1 rule dispositions, UNVERIFIABLE rule intent, e-signature legality, the v1-vs-v3 sepsis screen, and FiO2/lactate/vasopressor canonical units as open pending committee/owner/legal ratification.
18 ADR outcomes from the Phase 5 design audit are all 'proposed' and unratified — treat as provisional until the team ratifies them.
